name: netdraw-icons
description: Vendor-neutral, MIT-licensed SVG network icons. All artwork original — no vendor IP.

icons.description: Generic router — circle with bi-directional cross arrows inside (R3 cross-through).
Layer 2 switch — chassis with port lines and a horizontal bi-directional arrow above.
Layer 3 switch — chassis with port lines and an L-bent routing arrow above.
Load balancer / ADC — input feeding a hub that fans out to three back-ends.
Wireless access point — dome with three radiating Wi-Fi arcs.
Physical server — vertical chassis with drive-bay dividers and indicator LEDs.
Hypervisor host — server silhouette with a stacked VM overlay.
Storage array — wide rack with drive-bay divisions and indicator LEDs.
End user / laptop — lid above a trapezoidal keyboard base.
Data centre — large industrial building with floor lines and a wide entry.
Branch office — small pitched-roof building with a single door.
Generic cloud — puffy outline for WAN abstraction and generic cloud platforms.
Internet — globe with equator, prime meridian, and a side meridian for depth.
WAN / MPLS carrier cloud — cloud outline with a 3-node mesh interior.
HA / redundant pair overlay — two short parallel bars, bottom-right.
Virtual instance overlay — dashed bounding box inset from canvas edge.
Alert / SPOF overlay — small triangle with exclamation, top-right.
Planned / not built — no overlay glyph; renderer toggles stroke-dasharray.
